privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for a NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) simulation environment. The task creates two test channels: Regional_ADT_Feed and Lab_Orders_Interface, generated programmatically with unique UUIDs during setup. NextGen Connect is real healthcare integration software owned by NextGen Healthcare, and the Data Pruner extension is a real component that manages message retention policies. The specified retention settings (3-7 days for content, 30-90 days for metadata) are plausible for healthcare data governance but are task-specific requirements, not industry defaults. All channel data is synthetic and created dynamically by the task setup script, not sourced from real healthcare systems. The pruner block size of 1000 matches documented Mirth Connect defaults, though recent versions default to 50000.
